calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: DONALD J. SULLIVAN Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: S. Wong # 11288.
Petitioner BARBARA STEINKEMPER was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minors MARCELO RANCISCO GUIA STEINKEMPER and NINA FRANCISCA STEINKEMPER GUIA.

Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Minor's father was not present, the Court proceeds with hearing.
Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to MARCELO FRANCISCO GUIA STEINKEMPER to MARCELO FRANCISCO STEINKEMPER and NINIA FRANCISCA STEINKEMPER GUIA to NINA FRANCISCA STEINKEMPER.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Dec-21-2011 Denied
